title: Level 434
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:N is for Novice}} {{CSS|content= .image { display:inline-block; box-shadow: 0px 0px 10px #FFFFFF; transition: transform 0.35s ease; } .image:hover { transform: scale(1.025); } .fandom-community-header__image img { opacity: 0; } .fandom-community-header__image:before { content: ''; background: url(https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/128/2413/2413469.png) no-repeat; margin: 0.9rem 0 0rem 0rem; width: 100px; height: 112px; background-size: 95px; position: absolute; transition: 0s; } }} {{Background|file=the void.png}}
{{VoidedTheme|mono}} {{CSS|content= @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Akronim&family=Indie+Flower&display=swap'); }} [[File:Screenshot 2025-04-26 192345-NEW Level 434-1.png|center|1034x1034px|frameless]]
WELCOME!
Is the weight of living in a world of liminality holding you down?
Have you ever wanted to find a place to escape the horrors of the Backrooms?
Well, we have got the perfect solution for you...
Introducing Yonder...
A place to give you nostalgia.
A place to enjoy life within.
A place to call '''''home'''''.
Perfect blocks scattered across hundreds of miles...
Constantly sunny skies...
...and a childlike feel.
Have you ever felt the need to simply get away from it all?
Come to Yonder, where you will feel normal again.
Perfect living, perfect life...
Forever...
=
'''Level 9: "Darkened Suburbs"'''
=
{{Underline|FFD000}}


"Yo Theo!"


"What?"



"Can I tell you a joke?"


"Bro you seriously picked THE WORST TIME for something like this, we're literally trying to survive out here!"



"Plus your jokes are so bad that you cannot make anybody laugh for the better of you."



"I am actually certain this is gonna make you laugh, I promise."


"Alright fine, but if we die out here it's all your fault."



"Why did Mrs. Dracula hate sleeping next to Count Dracula?"


"Why?"



"Because of his coffin."


"Okay that was actually your best one yet, I got to admit."



"Wait a minute..."


"Bro, bro, bro..."


"What is it?"



"Look up."


"Huh?"



"Like actually look up."


"Wait, has the sky gotten brighter?"



"It did."


"We seem to be in some new area."


[[File:Screenshot 2025-04-02 110836-434-1-2.png|link=|center|500x500px]] =
'''???'''
=
{{Underline|A155B9}}


"This place looks similar to where we have just come from, but it's morning"


"I don’t think that this is a completely different level. Maybe a sublevel?"



"This might be, but I don't think we ever saw this on the database, the closest level to this would probably be [[Level 9.2|9.2]].


"Wait, if we have never seen this on the database before, then that means..."



"We have just discovered a new level."


"Damn, I would have never thought today would be the day we would discover a new level!"



"Wait Theo."


"What?"



"This place feels so... familiar."


"Of course, it feels familiar. The Backrooms is supposed to induce that feeling, that’s the whole point.



"No, no, it's something more than that. Like this level had some sort of significance in my life or something."


"What do you mean?"



"Like this level was the trademark of some part of my life, like this was something I would talk about for ages, an interest of mine."


"I have no idea how to properly describe this feeling."


"Stop overanalyzing things, I have no idea what you mean."



"Also, have you realized that its now an early noon?"



[[File:Screenshot 2025-04-04 082056-434-1-3.png|link=|center|500x500px]]


"This looks—"



"'''Yonder'''"


"Huh?"



"I literally remember it now! Yonder!"


"The hell do you mean?"



"How could you forget Yonder? Mysterious Backchat account starts sending out weird adverts to this level and it goes viral? We talked about this for ages."


"Oh, I remember now, but why do you think this level is what the Yonder adverts were talking about?"



"This looks so similar to those images, those surrealist images. Also-"


"Huh?"



"Do you remember Zach?"


----





[[File:Site-logo-binary.png|100px|center|link=]]
Welcome to Backchat, the #1 forum in the Backrooms.
'''Y0NDER''' Has the weight of living in a world of liminality been holding you down? Come to Yonder, the perfect place to get away from the everlasting danger of the Backrooms! All you have to do is to find us at the following levels: [[Level 9]], [[Level 39]], [[Level 106]] [[Level 182]] and [[Level 239]]. You'll know when you have arrived as our welcome sign will be present at each entrance! Make your new home at Yonder, the dreamy landscape that is real even when you are awake!
'''Nshells''' This sounds like an interesting place, I'll probably have to consider paying a visit!
'''CarrotCake''' '''@Nshells''' I don't think you should go.
'''Kimpton456''' Mods ban this partygoer.
'''Azulphobia''' '''@Kimpton456''' This seems too professionally written to be from a partygoer.
'''Nshells''' '''@Carrotcake''' Why so?
'''Carrotcake''' '''@Nshells''' This sounds too good to be true, probably came from some entity with malicious intentions.
'''Azulphobia''' '''@Carrotcake''' Where do you reckon it came from?
'''Carrotcake''' '''@Azulphobia''' I have no idea, but we will definitely find out eventually.






[[File:Site-logo-binary.png|100px|center|link=]]
Welcome to Backchat Direct Messages, Backchat's newest live groupchatting feature.
'''Tracheyon''': sup guys '''CelestialRose444''': *GASPS* I have been summoned... '''civillymaybejosh''': okay why did zach create this gc? '''CelestialRose444''': i dunno '''itzzach'''(op): hey yall '''Tracheyon''': yo zach '''civillymaybejosh''': zach why you create this gc? '''itzzach'''(op): okay guys you saw or heard about the yonder adverts going around backchat right? '''CelestialRose444''': yep '''Tracheyon''': wait who is yonder? '''civillymaybejosh''': bros been living under a rock '''CelestialRose444''': not just a rock a pile of rocks 😭 '''civillymaybejosh''': zach enlighten him '''itzzach'''(op): this weird account by the name of yonder, all caps and a 0 replacing the o, started copy and pasting a whole bunch of adverts on backchat threads advertising some suburban community by the same name. a lot of people did not take it seriously, though some did. we have no clue where they went, though its assumed that they attempted to go to the yonder level. '''Tracheyon''': oh NOW I REMEMBER '''CelestialRose444''': bro finally remembers 💀 '''Tracheyon''': i had no idea it was this big though '''Tracheyon''': alright zach what about this yonder thing? '''itzzach'''(op): im going to the level '''itzzach'''(op): if anyone's gonna document it and finally get answers, it will be me. '''CelestialRose444''': WAIT YOURE GOING? '''Tracheyon''': WHAATTTT '''itzzach'''(op): this is for the good of everyone. I am willing to be the valiant sacrifice. '''civillymaybejosh''': bro you are honestly so idiotic that im surprised your daredevil stunts haven't killed you yet. '''itzzach'''(op): dont worry josh ill be fine. besides you remember that lil recorder thing on my computer? '''CelestialRose444''': oh yeah the one where you can sync up an audio log and it’ll save as you record? '''itzzach'''(op): yep. '''itzzach'''(op): ill also update yall with the facets of my journey, so that you dont have to worry about me. '''civillymaybejosh''': ''sigh'' '''civillymaybejosh''': looks like theres no stopping you huh? '''itzzach'''(op): mhm. '''civillymaybejosh''': alright zach you can go but under one condition. '''itzzach'''(op): and that is? '''civillymaybejosh''': please return safe and sound. '''itzzach'''(op): i will but not promising. '''civillymaybejosh''': ugh fine. '''civillymaybejosh''': goodbye zach, either for now or forever.






[[File:Site-logo-binary.png|100px|center|link=]]
Welcome to Backchat, the #1 forum in the Backrooms.
'''M.E.G_Official_Account''' Hello Backchatters! We have important news regarding the case of the disappearance of Zachary G and the Yonder situation. The recently submitted logs made by two wanderers; Josh and Theo, two potential survivors of the Yonder level, may confirm its existence. As such we are reopening the case and investigating this particular level. For the time being, due to associated disappearances, we advise everyone to not trust any adverts or DMs sent by any account named Y0NDER or any variation of the username. If you ever see a Yonder welcome sign in any level of the Backrooms, do not go beyond it, as those signs seemingly indicate an entrance to the level. As of now, no exits have been discovered due to the level's undocumented nature. Stay safe everyone! -M.E.G.
'''Pepperyspice''' I knew it, I knew it existed.
'''Lol909funny''' Most influential moment in Backrooms history:
'''8888888''' '''@Lol909funny''' fr.
